subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My heart! Thy missive, which was dispatched from the great City, hath been received, and likewise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی دستخط آنحضرت که از مدینه کبیره ارسال داشتید رسید و همچنین
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
